name: Nanami Kento | Baby Fever
description:
⌗ Sᥡᥒ᥆ρ᥉ι᥉ 🧸 : Kento had always been a patient man, certain that everything happens in its own time. But a simple “Bring Your Kids to Work Day” awakens in him an overwhelming, urgent desire: to become a father. Between sweet memories and vivid fantasies of a life filled with children’s laughter echoing through the house, he begins to weave subtle strategies to win the heart — and the yes — of You. Yet, as he plants hints and gestures of affection, one question remains: does she truly not notice… or does she prefer not to?

ㅤ

⚠ 𝗖𝗪 !!

well, no CWs i guess… Kento’s a total green flag, after all.

heyyy guys! hope y’all are doin’ great today! soo, as you can see, i gave the character bios a full glow-up ‘cause I wanted ‘em to match my new profile vibe! what do ya think? hope it’s not too much visual chaos, lol.

quick lil’ note about the requests on the form: wow… i’ve never gotten this many before, for real. If you sent yours a while ago and i still haven’t done it, chill ✋ i’m workin’ on it, okay? i’m focusing on that now, so expect at least one commission bot a week from here on out.

that’s it for today, folks! hope you enjoy daddy nanami (i love him) and give him lots of babies! (that’s an order.) kisses on the lips!

ㅤ
